notes: MMPDB generate emits the one-cut hydrogen deletion product from test_data_2019.mmpdb.
MMPDB generate is one-cut only; lower-level weld_fragments can weld this disconnected target variable.
Connected constants can collapse the lower-level weld result into one molecule, but the parity source is not generate.
Attachment order changes the welded lower-level product; OEMMPA keeps disconnected variables unsupported.
This control proves the existing connected-variable guard is broader than hydrogen deletion.
